rollout.reason: This slice records architecture evidence only and does not alter runtime topology or schemas.

currentCodeEvidence: backend/canvas-engine contains web, domain, scheduler, and persistence code in one deployable application.
candidates.scaleTrigger: Independent scaling or ownership pain is measured in production readiness work.
candidates.compatibility: Child spec must keep monolith deploy rollback until split service proves parity.
candidates.dependencyStatus: P0/P1 safety and observability gates must be complete.

currentCodeEvidence: Frontend editor behavior is built around current canvas-editor modules and graph helpers.
candidates.scaleTrigger: Measured editor performance or maintainability problem exceeds targeted fixes.
candidates.compatibility: Child spec must preserve import/export and saved graph compatibility.
candidates.rollback: Keep the current editor implementation and disable alternate editor route.
candidates.dependencyStatus: Requires editor productivity and graph state evidence.

currentCodeEvidence: Current runtime uses existing scheduler, MQ, and trace paths rather than Flink CEP.
candidates.scaleTrigger: Complex event workloads exceed current scheduler and MQ guarantees.
candidates.compatibility: Child spec must prove dual-run or replay compatibility.
candidates.rollback: Route event execution back to current scheduler path.
candidates.dependencyStatus: Requires event trace schema and runtime evidence.

currentCodeEvidence: Local development and deployment assumptions are centered on the current Docker and service stack.
candidates.scaleTrigger: Customer or resilience requirement demands multiple cloud targets.
candidates.compatibility: Child spec must define config, secrets, networking, and data-store compatibility.
candidates.rollback: Deploy only to the current supported environment.
candidates.dependencyStatus: Requires production operability gates and infrastructure owner.

currentCodeEvidence: Current execution model depends on long-running application services and local runtime coordination.
candidates.scaleTrigger: No accepted trigger; evidence does not justify serverless execution now.
candidates.compatibility: Would require cold-start, timeout, and state compatibility proof.
candidates.dependencyStatus: Blocked until runtime evidence shows serverless fit.

currentCodeEvidence: Current product runs backend behavior centrally and does not define edge execution contracts.
candidates.scaleTrigger: Latency or regional availability evidence requires edge placement.
candidates.compatibility: Child spec must define cache invalidation, auth, and data-access boundaries.
candidates.rollback: Route traffic to central backend only.
candidates.dependencyStatus: Requires data residency and deployment evidence.

currentCodeEvidence: Tenant data locality rules are not represented as a first-class architecture decision in this package yet.
candidates.scaleTrigger: Target regions or enterprise contracts require residency controls.
candidates.compatibility: Child spec must define tenant routing, backups, analytics, and support access constraints.
candidates.rollback: Do not sell residency-bound regions until controls are accepted.
